# Reference: Mobile Onboarding Flow

This is unrelated cross-domain reference material used only as a retrieval distractor.

The mobile onboarding redesign defines the user journey from the welcome screen through
account creation to the first guided action. It documents the navigation between screens
and the loading, empty, and error states for each step. The main users are first-time
mobile customers. The objective is to lift activation by guiding new users through a clear
sequence. In scope: the onboarding screens and their copy. Out of scope: settings and the
billing screens. Quality is judged by whether the journey feels obvious without a tutorial.
